story: Bob went to the barber for a haircut. “Just take about an inch off,” Bob said. The barber cut the front uneven, so he had to go shorter. “It’s shorter than you wanted,” he said. “Oh well,” Bob replied, “it’ll grow out.”
question: Did Bob want to keep the same hairstyle?

story:
Roger, new at the office, told Andrew, “My wife’s a lawyer.” Moments later, Claire walked into the coffee room, complaining, “Lawyers are so arrogant and greedy.”
Andrew asked Claire to review reports.
“Not now,” she said. “I need coffee.”
question: Did anyone say something they shouldn't have said or something awkward?
